sourceText: Fossils are invaluable records of past life.
Suggests that through the study of fossils, one can understand past ecosystems and life forms, which is essential for understanding the evolution of present-day life.
Political pressure and opposition from rivals in establishing and maintaining her rule as a woman. Difficulty in securing legitimacy.

Presented herself in male pharaonic iconography and emphasized her father's designation as successor to solidify her claim. Led Egypt to prosperity through successful foreign trade and massive construction projects, gaining popular support and proving the legitimacy of her reign.
Justice is the path all people follow, and truth is like a star that shines eternally.
This means that only righteous rule and truthful words can earn the trust of the people and be judged by history.
My soul is rooted in the divine, and my reign is founded upon justice.
This statement emphasizes that her rule aligns with the will of the gods and is based on fairness.
Nothing is impossible. It is only the will to achieve it that is lacking.
This implies that with strong will and determination, any difficulty can be overcome and goals achieved.
The solitude of pursuing philosophy amidst political turmoil and the frustration with societal ignorance.
Through detachment from society, he deeply explored inner wisdom and discovered 'Logos', the immutable truth within a changing world.
You cannot step into the same river twice.
